# Getting Help

- **Documentation:** [Getting Started](../docs/getting-started.md) | [Troubleshooting](../docs/troubleshooting.md)
- **Discord:** [Join the server](https://discord.gg/wEM9avTzb) for real-time help
- **Twitter/X:** [@BeecorkAI](https://x.com/BeecorkAI) for updates and announcements
- **GitHub Discussions:** [Ask a question](https://github.com/beecork/beecork/discussions) for searchable Q&A
- **Bug reports:** [Open an issue](https://github.com/beecork/beecork/issues/new/choose)
- **Security issues:** See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) — do not open a public issue
